title: Discovery, queries, and doctor
outcome: E09.S3 discovery/queries/doctor: Ontarch emits registry_generation+source_fingerprints on units.json/scan.json; Takogami registry readers with hit/miss/stale freshness; scan/list/info/tools/interfaces + expanded doctor (required vs optional; Herdr never required). Session* remains not_implemented. Hermetic fixture matrix covers current/missing/stale/malformed/unknown/ambiguous/invalid-filter/descriptor-less/JSON purity.
validation: moon run takogami:build/test/lint/format-check PASS (21 lib + 17 cli_smoke + 11 contracts). moon run ontarch:sync/validate PASS (registry_generation selfcheck).
decisions: Embed registry_generation on Ontarch units/scan emits; missing generation ⇒ stale.
list --filter is clap global on list so `list units --filter` works.
Source-fallback uses TOML-subset string extract (ponytail); upgrade path = toml crate.
Do not implement S2.1 rename in this session; next_session = E09.S2.1.
blockers: ontarch:secrets-scan detect mode still reports pre-existing age-secret-key in git history (commit a3a4978) — unchanged; out of E09.S3 scope.
token_note: Loaded STATE + E09.S3 + composition amendment + runtime-controller §§6.1–6.3 + 2 session records vs full E09 epic and Plan/bin collection.
